Products

The products behind better outcomes.

The quality of your work is shaped by the tools and partners you choose. At Blick, we make sure the products you need are not only the right ones — they're ready when you are.

Our fluids are stocked locally across Australia and New Zealand, backed by logistics that move fast when the ground changes. Every product we supply has been tested, supported, and chosen to help your team work faster, safer, and with fewer surprises.

From engineered fluids to world-class HDD tooling and thread compounds, everything we supply carries the same promise: quality and reliability, delivered on time, every time.

Blick Fluids Equipment & Tooling Grease & Compounds
Core Product Range

Blick Fluids

Engineered for local ground. Proven in the field.

Blick Fluids are designed and tested for the conditions drillers face across Australasia. They stabilise holes, manage solids, and keep rigs performing at their best — whether you're crossing under a city street or drilling 200 metres into basalt.

Every blend is developed with the insight of our field team and refined by feedback from contractors and engineers who use them every day.

It's not about the chemistry alone — it's about confidence in what's going downhole.

Blick Fluids
Categories

Three ranges. One standard.

Core Fluids

High-performance bentonite and polymer systems for consistent hole stability across every drilling method and ground condition.

Additives & Conditioners

PACs, stabilisers, and dispersants that fine-tune performance and reduce waste — giving you precise control downhole.

Specialty Products

Environmental and disposal solutions like MetaFLO that turn liquid waste into stackable solids — simplifying compliance on site.

Each product page includes technical data, SDS, and Product Sheets — everything you need to plan, quote, and execute with confidence.
Explore Blick Fluids Download SDS & Product Sheets
Equipment & Tooling

Equipment & Tooling

Reliable tools. Local support.

Your tooling determines how the job runs — speed, precision, and how much you trust the next joint in the string.

Blick partners with world-class manufacturers to bring equipment that performs when it counts, supported by people who understand the pressures in the field.

HDD Tools

Melfred Borzall reamers, bits, and housings

Drill Rods

Thread quality and toughness for every application

Bits & DTH

Components for the region's toughest ground

Partner

Melfred Borzall HDD Tools

The global leader in HDD tooling — engineered in California, supported locally by Blick. Built for productivity, reliability, and value, every reamer, bit, and housing is backed by our in-country advice and after-sales support.

Precision

Drill Rods & Collars

Built for longevity and precision. Our rods and adaptors are selected for thread quality and toughness, reducing wear and downtime across HDD, geotech, and waterwell applications.

Performance

Bits & Accessories

From down-the-hole hammers to coring bits and stabilisers, Blick supplies proven components designed to handle the region's toughest ground conditions.

Talk to Us About Tooling Options
Grease & Compounds

Grease

Protection that performs.

When you rely on threaded connections, sealing surfaces, and high-temperature joints, failure isn't an option. Blick supplies the full range of Jet Lube compounds trusted worldwide for performance, environmental compliance, and reliability.

Thread Compounds

Premium anti-seize and makeup lubricants for drill strings, collars, and casing — protecting connections under extreme torque and pressure.

Valve & Sealing Compounds

Products for high-pressure sealing and assembly — ensuring leak-free performance across critical systems and equipment.

Specialty Grease

High-temperature, food-grade, and environmentally responsible lubricants for critical components where reliability is non-negotiable.

Because protecting equipment is more than maintenance — it's part of delivering a job that runs right from start to finish.

View Jet Lube Range
A Better Product Story

We choose partners who share our values

People who build quality products, stand behind their work, and show up when it counts. That's why every item we supply fits into one simple promise: better outcomes, lower risk, and a smoother path to success.

Let's Talk

Every successful project starts with the right conversation

Let's talk about yours.
